examples: The painting is a masterpiece in the truest sense of the word.
Failing at something can help you discover your truest friends, or help you find unexpected motivation to succeed.
Books, I realise, have been one of my longest, truest friends.
Today, the hip-hop impresario has evolved into a celebrity, in the truest sense of the word.
It's a "fat farm" in the truest sense--but too much fattening can hurt the taste.
